appraisal_events.evidence: « ...exemple de folie unilatérale chez un homme intelligent s'adressant à un imbécile sensé. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator frames Charlus’s long letter to Aimé as the product of a one-sided, unbalanced passion, rendering Charlus locally ridiculous and exposed by his grandiose offers and repeated rebuffs.

status_effects.explanation: Charlus appears locally diminished by being portrayed as unbalanced and self-exposing in his letter and failed approaches to Aimé.
